selection_rule: Use these as decision vocabulary, never as identity to copy. Select from product truth, audience, content density, media constraints, and accepted brand context.

patterns.signature: oversized neutral type against compact evidence
patterns.use_when: One assertion must dominate a media-like composition
patterns.avoid_when: Dense repeated operations require quiet scanning

patterns.signature: heavy outlines and high-contrast color blocks
patterns.use_when: Playful utility and obvious interaction are intentional
patterns.avoid_when: Luxury, accessibility-sensitive, or high-density enterprise work

patterns.signature: offset collage, geometric fragments, retro type
patterns.use_when: A cultural or youth campaign needs expressive energy
patterns.avoid_when: Product inspection or precise data comparison is primary

patterns.signature: clear geometry, raised controls, optimistic color
patterns.use_when: Learning, onboarding, or game-like progression benefits from warmth
patterns.avoid_when: Serious financial, legal, or incident workflows

patterns.signature: code-native geometric illustration that responds to layout
patterns.use_when: The construction itself reinforces a technical or conceptual idea
patterns.avoid_when: A real product image or factual visual is available

patterns.signature: black-white field with typography as the main image
patterns.use_when: A short statement and strong identity carry the page
patterns.avoid_when: Long labels, localization, or many parallel facts must fit

patterns.signature: archival space-catalog structure with restrained retro cues
patterns.use_when: Science, culture, or speculative storytelling benefits from wonder
patterns.avoid_when: The product requires literal operational proof

patterns.signature: dark cinematic field with waveform or spectrum focus
patterns.use_when: Audio is a truthful primary signal
patterns.avoid_when: Sound is absent or decorative only

patterns.signature: pixel-grid scenes and side-scrolling progression
patterns.use_when: Game culture or stepwise narrative is central
patterns.avoid_when: Professional realism or small-text density is required

patterns.signature: primary geometry, disciplined asymmetry, functional type
patterns.use_when: A system needs recognisable structure with controlled expression
patterns.avoid_when: Existing brand assets conflict with primary geometry

patterns.signature: dark field, one accent, mono evidence, editorial hierarchy
patterns.use_when: Code or terminal proof is primary
patterns.avoid_when: Long-form daylight reading is the main task

patterns.signature: warm paper field and serif-sans contrast
patterns.use_when: Human, cultural, or considered storytelling needs reading rhythm
patterns.avoid_when: Fast operational scanning or strict brand color is required

patterns.signature: modular grid with restrained depth and glow
patterns.use_when: Several distinct product capabilities need a coherent overview
patterns.avoid_when: It would become a decorative card wall or hide dense relationships

patterns.signature: one directional color band creates movement through sections
patterns.use_when: A launch story needs continuity without many decorative objects
patterns.avoid_when: Gradient reproduction, print, or editable PPTX constraints apply

patterns.signature: semantic color categories inside a utilitarian information system
patterns.use_when: Readers browse many topic types and need orientation
patterns.avoid_when: Color categories are not stable or accessible

patterns.signature: mono evidence with restrained spatial or isometric structure
patterns.use_when: A CLI or agent system needs technical identity and real output
patterns.avoid_when: Generic neon styling would replace product proof

patterns.signature: system typography, visible grid lines, direct links
patterns.use_when: Information architecture and navigation are the product
patterns.avoid_when: A premium object or emotional campaign must lead

patterns.signature: large factual images in deep negative space with metadata
patterns.use_when: Users must inspect real visual work
patterns.avoid_when: Images are weak, generic, or unavailable

patterns.signature: strict black-white hierarchy, grid, and sharp edges
patterns.use_when: Precision and content confidence need no decorative support
patterns.avoid_when: Status semantics require several colors

patterns.signature: large white field, careful object placement, minimal annotation
patterns.use_when: One object or craft detail deserves contemplation
patterns.avoid_when: Many actions or comparison criteria must remain visible

patterns.signature: asymmetric giant type and sharp institutional grid
patterns.use_when: A stage presentation needs one memorable assertion per frame
patterns.avoid_when: The deck is primarily a detailed reference document

patterns.signature: black field with one oversized number and concise interpretation
patterns.use_when: A verified metric is the dramatic center
patterns.avoid_when: Numbers lack context, units, period, or source

patterns.signature: single brand color with typography as hero
patterns.use_when: A launch has strong identity and short statements
patterns.avoid_when: Brand color cannot carry accessible contrast

patterns.signature: full-bleed color transition behind a concise declaration
patterns.use_when: Visual atmosphere matters more than editability
patterns.avoid_when: Editable HTML-to-PPTX mode is required

patterns.signature: one concept per bright geometric stage
patterns.use_when: Teaching benefits from approachable separation of ideas
patterns.avoid_when: The audience expects formal corporate restraint

patterns.signature: hand-made accents with disciplined editorial anchors
patterns.use_when: A creative brand needs warmth without losing hierarchy
patterns.avoid_when: Decoration cannot be sourced or controlled

patterns.signature: direct humor, surprising crops, and colloquial emphasis
patterns.use_when: Audience culture explicitly supports informality
patterns.avoid_when: Executive, regulated, or reputationally sensitive settings

patterns.signature: inflated type and early-digital spatial cues
patterns.use_when: A fashion, music, or youth launch needs period expression
patterns.avoid_when: Editable PPTX or high information density is required

patterns.signature: modular evidence blocks with deliberate size hierarchy
patterns.use_when: Several product proofs need one coherent frame
patterns.avoid_when: Every page would repeat the same grid

patterns.signature: hairline dark grid, mono labels, one restrained accent
patterns.use_when: Architecture, code, or terminal evidence drives the deck
patterns.avoid_when: Audience readability or projector contrast is uncertain

patterns.signature: assertion-led pages using a disciplined serif-sans pair
patterns.use_when: A business argument needs authority and readable explanation
patterns.avoid_when: Existing corporate templates prohibit type changes

patterns.signature: arrows, icons, and repeated units explain a system
patterns.use_when: Relationships and flow matter more than decoration
patterns.avoid_when: The diagram would imply unsupported precision

patterns.signature: one visual model with short explanatory labels
patterns.use_when: A complex concept can be reduced to one accurate mechanism
patterns.avoid_when: The reduction would hide critical exceptions

patterns.signature: small trend traces embedded in a verbal argument
patterns.use_when: Change over time supports a sequence of claims
patterns.avoid_when: Axes, uncertainty, or comparison require a full chart

patterns.signature: one sentence claim paired with only the evidence needed to test it
patterns.use_when: Decision quality and analytical honesty are primary
patterns.avoid_when: The deck is intended as pure visual atmosphere

patterns.signature: stable grid, restrained color, precise labels
patterns.use_when: Public, research, or institutional credibility matters
patterns.avoid_when: A consumer launch needs emotional differentiation

patterns.signature: chapter rhythm, pull quotes, captions, and varied evidence pages
patterns.use_when: The deck is also a durable reading document
patterns.avoid_when: A short live pitch needs fast visual beats

patterns.signature: soft geometry, human type, and generous guidance
patterns.use_when: Trust, learning, or support should feel approachable
patterns.avoid_when: Rounded cards would flatten every information type

patterns.signature: high information density governed by a strict analytical grid
patterns.use_when: Expert audiences need many sourced comparisons
patterns.avoid_when: Live audiences cannot inspect small details

patterns.signature: plain text with decisive hierarchy and no decorative dependence
patterns.use_when: The argument itself is strong and must travel across formats
patterns.avoid_when: Product inspection or data visualization is required

score_definition.1: poor fit without custom graphics or render infrastructure

font_stack_profiles.editorial-pair: Source Serif 4, Georgia, serif / Inter, ui-sans-serif, sans-serif
font_stack_profiles.functional-mono: IBM Plex Mono, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, monospace / Inter, ui-sans-serif, sans-serif
font_stack_profiles.humanist-sans: Atkinson Hyperlegible, Segoe UI, ui-sans-serif, sans-serif
font_stack_profiles.display-expressive: project-owned display face / Inter, ui-sans-serif, sans-serif
